name: Tabs (Animated)
description: Animated tab component with smooth Framer Motion transitions between tab panels, featuring an underline indicator that slides between tabs.
whenToUse: Use for tabbed content sections, feature comparisons, or any UI requiring animated tab switching with smooth content transitions.

props.name: tabs
props.type: { title: string; value: string; content?: React.ReactNode }[]
props.description: Array of tab definitions with title, value, and content

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the tabs container

props.name: activeTabClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the active tab button

props.name: tabClassName
props.description: CSS classes for each tab button

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the tab content panel
